addCaptionMessage: Enter a message to send with the image
permissionMessage: Audio recording permission is required to send voice messages. Please grant permission in your device settings.
recordingFailed: Failed to start recording. Please try again.
deleteMessageBody: Are you sure you want to delete this message?
regenerateBody: Delete this response and regenerate a new one?
editResendBody: Send this edited message? The original response will be removed.
deleteEntityBody: Delete "{{name}}"? Chat history will be preserved but this entity will no longer be accessible.
